{{Quote|Die on the planet, die in space. No matter.|A Dungeontown resident|<ref name="DSn" />}}
'''Dungeontown''' was a makeshift prisoner shantytown on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Despayre]].

==Description==
Dungeontown accommodated criminal convicts sentenced to the planet.<ref name="DSn" /> 

==History==
[[Teela Kaarz]] was among several hundred prisoners from Dungeontown who were recruited by the Empire seeking additional slave labor for the construction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] in orbit above the planet, leaving Despayre onboard the prisoner transport ship ''[[GLTB-3181]]'' in [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]].<ref name="DSn" />

Dungeontown was destroyed when the Death Star fired upon the planet in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="DSn" />

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1stm}}
